title: Dense Bi-Encoder Retrieval and Domain Transfer · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved trace contains a plausible dense retrieval candidate service with one ingestion, normalization, chunking, lexical, embedding, index, filter, fusion, reranking, context, generation, citation, authorization, latency, or recovery defect; identify the first failed stage before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in dense retrieval candidate service and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Separate offline document encoding from online query encoding while preserving one versioned bi-encoder space.
Apply model-specific query and document prompts, prefixes, normalization, and maximum-length behavior.
Tune candidate depth from recall and downstream reranking evidence rather than context-window size.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Embedding Migration
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-embedding-migration-h4f5o6" that uses case 7433 to gate dense retrieval on one embedding space, candidate recall, domain, and language evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Embedding Migration.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Rag Embedding Migration into observable performance evidence. For RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Embedding Migration, keep Rag Embedding Migration connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-embedding-migration-h4f5o6
# Competency: rag-embedding-migration.
# Case 7433: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def evidence_rag_embedding_migration_h4f5o6(query_model: str = "retriever-v4", document_model: str = "retriever-v4", candidate_count: int = 50, relevant_rank: int = 4, domain_evaluated: bool = True, multilingual_evaluated: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_h4f5o6 = "h4f5o6-6o5f4h-7433"
    assert evidence_variant_h4f5o6
    evidence_axes_h4f5o6 = (
        "corpush4f5o6",
        "query6o5f4h",
        "tenant7433",
        "indexh4f5o67433",
        "prompt6o5f4h7433",
        "evaluation7433h4f5o6",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_h4f5o6)) == 6
    if query_model != document_model:
        return False, 0, "model-space-mismatch"
    if candidate_count <= 0 or relevant_rank < 1 or relevant_rank > candidate_count:
        return False, relevant_rank, "candidate-rank"
    if not domain_evaluated:
        return False, relevant_rank, "domain-transfer"
    if not multilingual_evaluated:
        return False, relevant_rank, "language-transfer"
    recall_proxy = candidate_count - relevant_rank + 1
    assert recall_proxy > 0
    return True, recall_proxy, "dense-candidates"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
